name: Racheal Makowa
bio: A lover of writing who uses it to express themselves fully, drawn to the guild by a deep appreciation for written art.

name: Success Omoregie
bio: Believes writing is a healthy way of expressing emotions, observations, and passions, helping to find and inspire strength in hard times.

name: Alexander Mshanga
bio: Enjoys expressing the ideas that go around in their head and loves sharing their art with people.

name: Juliana Paul
bio: Draws inspiration from life experiences and seeks a fantastic way to connect with other writers.

name: Desire Kabota
bio: Finds writing to be a unique form of expression that mere speaking lacks, driven by a love for written art.

name: Fraha Zabweka Manda
bio: Views writing as a safe outlet to express thoughts without fear of judgment, driven by a love for written art.

name: Dickson Dzinjalamala
bio: Finds writing to be a powerful form of expression and joined the guild to share their art with others.
